Re Notice Of Motion For Stay Of Action Pending Arbitration; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pedram Minoofar of Hunt Ortmann Blasco Palffy & Rossell, Inc., 626-440-5200, appearing for plaintiff Martin Bros./Marcowall, Inc.
Kenneth G. Jones of Bowles & Verna, 925-935-3300, appearing for defendant Webcor Construction, Inc.
Lee Kaster of Sonnenschein, Nath & Rosenthal, LLP, 882-5002, appearing for defendant SF Museum Tower, LLC

Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MARTIN BROS./MARCOWALL, INC.'S Motion For Stay Of Action Pending Arbitration is denied by reference to the prime contract's dispute resolution provisions. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/xJK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
